query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A city street scene flanked by tall, multi-story buildings with grid-like windows. Pedestrians are walking along the sidewalks on both sides of the street. A large, bright, semi-transparent white shape dominates the center foreground, obscuring part of the view.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A city street scene with tall buildings and pedestrians, characterized by a large, ghostly white overlay in the center that suggests a double exposure effect, presented in a heavily washed-out, faded color palette.
